APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MAYFIELD, GLORIA

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT GLORIA MAYFIELD'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. GLORIA MAYFIELD HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: EBURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT GLORIA MAYFIELD'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND REPORTER FEES. GLORIA MAYFIELD HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: EBURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
ORDER OF THE COURT TO SET ASIDE ORDER OF JULY 7, 2008 STRIKING DEFENDANT'S ANSWER
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
